operations.contentPreview:
; AI_PATCH_BEGIN: boxer_bl:power_charge_shim:v1
; Compatibility power-charge shim generated from native charge sequence.
; Native hold state 11111, end state 11112.
; AI_PATCH_CHARGE_RATE_POLICY: Roxy/Rose-style ramp, not native per-tick burst gain.
[StateDef 730]
type = S
physics = S
moveType = I
anim = 11111
velSet = 0,0
ctrl = 0

[State 730, AI Patch Reused PlaySnd]
type = PlaySnd
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
value = s11111,0
channel = 11

[State 730, AI Patch Reused PlaySnd]
type = PlaySnd
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
value = s1,111
channel = 9

[State 730, AI Patch Reused Explod]
type = Explod
trigger1 = time = 0
anim = 11113
ID = 11111
sprpriority = 3
postype = p1
pos = -12,0
bindtime = -1
removeongethit = 1
; AI_PATCH_CHARGE_EFFECT_REFRESH: keep short non-looping hold explods alive while charge continues.
trigger2 = time > 0 && !NumExplod(11111)

[State 730, PowerAdd]
type = PowerAdd
triggerAll = Power < const(data.power) && Power < PowerMax
trigger1 = !AILevel && (command = "hold_a" || command = "hold_y" || command = "hold_c")
trigger2 = AILevel
value = 2 + ifElse(time < 60, 0, (time - 60) / 12)

[State 730, End]
type = ChangeState
trigger1 = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax || RoundState != 2
trigger2 = !AILevel && !(command = "hold_a" || command = "hold_y" || command = "hold_c")
trigger3 = AILevel && (InGuardDist || P2BodyDist X <= 120 || EnemyNear,MoveType = A || Enemy,NumProj > 0)
value = 731
ctrl = 1

[StateDef 731]
type = S
physics = S
moveType = I
anim = 11112
velSet = 0,0
ctrl = 1

[State 731, AI Patch Reused StopSnd]
type = StopSnd
trigger1 = animtime = 0
channel = 11

[State 731, AI Patch Reused StopSnd]
type = StopSnd
trigger1 = animtime = 0
channel = 9

[State 731, AI Patch Reused RemoveExplod]
type = RemoveExplod
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
ID = 11111

[State 731, AI Patch Reused RemoveExplod]
type = RemoveExplod
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
ID = 11111

[State 731, AI Patch Reused StopSnd]
type = StopSnd
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = animtime = 0
channel = 11

[State 912, StopSnd] ;OPCIONAL
type = StopSnd
trigger1 = animtime = 0
channel = 9

[State 731, AI Patch Reused Explod]
type = Explod
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = time = 0
anim = 11114
scale = .8,.8
pos = 0,0
postype = p1
facing = 1
vfacing = 1
bindtime = 1
removetime = -2
scale = 1,1
sprpriority = 7

[State 731, AI Patch Reused EnvShake]
type = EnvShake
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
time = 15
freq = 90
ampl = -5
phase = 90

[State 731, AI Patch Reused PlaySnd]
type = PlaySnd
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = time = 0
value = s11111,1

[State 731, AI Patch Reused RemoveExplod]
type = RemoveExplod
triggerAll = Power >= const(data.power) || Power >= PowerMax
trigger1 = AnimElem = 1
ID = 730

[State 731, End]
type = ChangeState
trigger1 = AnimTime = 0
value = 0
ctrl = 1
; AI_PATCH_END: boxer_bl:power_charge_shim:v1

; AI_PATCH_BEGIN: boxer_bl:resolver_target_stuck_watchdog:v1
; Resolver safety watchdog for scanner-detected custom target / visual-helper risk.
; It releases long-lived custom throw/get-hit states only after a conservative timeout.
; This prevents missing-target custom states from freezing the patched character without interrupting normal throws early.
[State -2, AI Patch Self NoTarget Custom State Escape Ground]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = StateType != A
triggerAll = Time > 180
triggerAll = !NumTarget
triggerAll = MoveType != A
trigger1 = 1
value = 0
ctrl = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self NoTarget Custom State Escape Air]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = StateType = A
triggerAll = Time > 180
triggerAll = !NumTarget
triggerAll = MoveType != A
trigger1 = 1
value = 50
ctrl = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom Throw Escape Ground]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = MoveType = H
triggerAll = Time > 150
triggerAll = StateType != A
trigger1 = 1
value = 5120
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom Throw Escape Air]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = MoveType = H
triggerAll = Time > 150
triggerAll = StateType = A
trigger1 = 1
value = 5050
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom Throw Escape Dead]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = !Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = MoveType = H
triggerAll = Time > 150
trigger1 = 1
value = 5150
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom State 825 Escape Air]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = 825
triggerAll = Time > 150
triggerAll = !NumTarget || MoveType = H
triggerAll = StateType = A
trigger1 = 1
value = 5050
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom State 825 Escape Hit]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = 825
triggerAll = Time > 150
triggerAll = !NumTarget || MoveType = H
triggerAll = StateType != A
triggerAll = MoveType = H
trigger1 = 1
value = 5120
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Self Custom State 825 Escape Neutral]
type = SelfState
triggerAll = AILevel && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Alive
triggerAll = StateNo = 825
triggerAll = Time > 150
triggerAll = !NumTarget
triggerAll = StateType != A
triggerAll = MoveType != H
trigger1 = 1
value = 0
ctrl = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Target Custom Throw Release]
type = TargetState
triggerAll = AILevel && NumTarget && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Target,Alive
triggerAll = Target,StateNo = [800,999]
triggerAll = Target,MoveType = H
triggerAll = Target,Time > 150
trigger1 = 1
value = 5120
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Target Stuck Release 5160]
type = TargetState
triggerAll = AILevel && NumTarget && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Target,Alive
triggerAll = Target,StateNo = 5160
triggerAll = Target,Time > 90
triggerAll = Target,StateType = L || Target,MoveType = H
trigger1 = 1
value = 5120
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, AI Patch Target Stuck Release Common Lie]
type = TargetState
triggerAll = AILevel && NumTarget && RoundState = 2
triggerAll = Target,Alive
triggerAll = Target,StateNo = [5100,5199]
triggerAll = Target,Time > 150
triggerAll = Target,StateType = L || Target,MoveType = H
trigger1 = 1
value = 5120
ignorehitpause = 1
; AI_PATCH_END: boxer_bl:resolver_target_stuck_watchdog:v1
